text: Modified Interest Subvention Scheme (MISS) Purpose: Provide short-term agricultural loans at subsidized rates. Eligibility: Farmers with a valid KCC; Aadhaar linkage mandatory. Benefits: Loans up to ₹3 lakh at 7% interest; 3% PRI for prompt repayment (effective 4%). Animal husbandry/fisheries loans covered up to ₹2 lakh. Application: Through lending institutions (PSBs, RRBs, etc.) with active KCC.

National Beekeeping & Honey Mission (NBHM) Purpose: Promote scientific beekeeping and increase income through 'Sweet Revolution'. Eligibility: Individuals, farmers, SHGs, cooperatives, FPOs, and entrepreneurs in beekeeping. Benefits: Technical training, infrastructure development (processing, testing labs), and support for increase in income. Application: Submit projects to National Bee Board (NBB) or State Departments of Agriculture.

Rashtriya Gokul Mission (RGM) Purpose: Develop and conserve indigenous bovine breeds and enhance milk production. Eligibility: Livestock farmers, dairy cooperatives, and SHGs. Benefits: Improvement of breeding infrastructure, Gokul Grams, artificial insemination, and e-Gopala app support. Application: Via State Implementing Agencies (SIA) or District Animal Husbandry and Dairying Department.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

text: Ayushman Sahakar Purpose: Help cooperatives create/modernize healthcare infrastructure. Eligibility: Cooperative societies with by-law provisions for healthcare/education. Benefits: Loans for hospitals, medical colleges, and AYUSH facilities; repayment up to 8 years. Application: Online via NCDC website (https://www.ncdc.in/) using Common Loan Application Form.

Krishi Kalyan Abhiyan Purpose: Help farmers in Aspirational Districts improve techniques and income. Eligibility: Farmers in Aspirational Districts identified by NITI Aayog. Benefits: Soil Health Card distribution, bovine vaccination, artificial insemination, and subsidized seeds/plants. Application: Coordinated by local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK). Farmers identified through local outreach.
